mermaidSyntax:
gantt
  title 24-Month Multi-Site Clinical Study Timeline
  dateFormat YYYY-MM
  axisFormat %b
  
  section Phase 1 - Preparation
    IRB Approval                    :p1, 2024-01, 2M
    Site Selection & Training       :p2, 2024-02, 2M
    Database Setup                  :p3, 2024-03, 2M
  
  section Phase 2 - Enrollment
    Site 1 Enrollment (M4-M8)       :e1, 2024-04, 5M
    Site 2 Enrollment (M5-M10)      :e2, 2024-05, 6M
    Site 3 Enrollment (M6-M12)      :e3, 2024-06, 7M
  
  section Phase 3 - Treatment
    Treatment Period (M8-M16)       :t1, 2024-08, 9M
    3-Month Follow-up (M16-M20)     :t2, 2025-04, 5M
  
  section Phase 4 - Analysis
    Data Lock                       :a1, 2025-06, 1M
    Statistical Analysis (M18-M21)  :a2, 2025-06, 4M
    Manuscript Prep (M21-M23)       :a3, 2025-09, 3M
    Submission (M24)                :crit, milestone, 2025-12, 0d
  
  section Milestones
    DSMB Review 1 (M8)              :m1, 2024-08, 0d
    DSMB Review 2 (M12)             :m2, 2024-12, 0d
    DSMB Review 3 (M16)             :m3, 2025-04, 0d
